message:
Rename Bundle job to Release

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -134,8 +134,8 @@ jobs:
         id: deployment
         uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
 
-  bundle:
-    name: Bundle
+  release:
+    name: Release
     if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
     needs: build
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
